instruction:
Check Stokes thorem using the function $\mathbf{v}=a y \, {\hat{\mathbf{x}}}+b x \, {\hat{\mathbf{y}}} \, ( a$ and $b$ uewms ndthecirular ahofrdad $R$ cenedathogih $x$ yplae. Anwr $\pi R^{2} ( b-a ) ]$
